title: Rollbound
description: The dice rolling solution brought to you by the Lumina Collection
body:
# Rollbound

**Rollbound** is a versatile Paper plugin that allows players (and admins) to roll dice and define custom success states. Part of the **Lumina Collection**, Rollbound is designed for role-play use and can work for personal dice-rolling-fun as well as a tool for role play encounters.

## Features
- Let players roll dice with different modifiers and custom rules.

## Installation
Download the latest release from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/rollbound).

## Documentation
For full configuration options and command references, visit the [Rollbound Documentation](https://docs.luminacollection.net/rollbound).

## Support
Need help? Check the official documentation or [open an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/Lumina-Collection/Rollbound/issues).
